nodes.content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Features Backlog","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"heading","version":1,"tag":"h1"},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Doesn't include experimental features. These are features I want to implement but there's more important ones to work on right now.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}
nodes.plain:
Features Backlog
Doesn't include experimental features. These are features I want to implement but there's more important ones to work on right now.

nodes.content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Magnetic guides, rules, and snapping","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"heading","version":1,"tag":"h2"},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Smart guides and snapping, plus also rulers. Also alignment commands like, taking a selection and aligning them horizontally/vertically or laying them out in a grid.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}
nodes.plain:
Magnetic guides, rules, and snapping
Smart guides and snapping, plus also rulers. Also alignment commands like, taking a selection and aligning them horizontally/vertically or laying them out in a grid.

nodes.content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Obsidian Crosslinking","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"heading","version":1,"tag":"h2"},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Once we link at least one vault, a tool to link to notes within the vault.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}
nodes.plain:
Obsidian Crosslinking
Once we link at least one vault, a tool to link to notes within the vault.

nodes.content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Ink Tools","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"heading","version":1,"tag":"h2"},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Full set of ink tools, supporting opacity, pressure sensitivity, etc.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Recognizing circles maybe? and other shapes.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}
nodes.plain:
Ink Tools
Full set of ink tools, supporting opacity, pressure sensitivity, etc.
Recognizing circles maybe? and other shapes.

nodes.content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Remembering Styles","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"heading","version":1,"tag":"h2"},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Like Miro, when you draw a line for example, or double click one, it remembers the style and applies it to next lines. Same for shapes, etc.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}
nodes.plain:
Remembering Styles
Like Miro, when you draw a line for example, or double click one, it remembers the style and applies it to next lines. Same for shapes, etc.

Tooltips
Having tooltips on tools may be useful.

nodes.plain:
Auto Updater
Pulling from github to auto update installed versions of the app

nodes.content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Navigation","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"heading","version":1,"tag":"h2"},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"When you go into a board, a button to go back (and also nav buttons on your mouse if you have them)","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}
nodes.plain:
Navigation
When you go into a board, a button to go back (and also nav buttons on your mouse if you have them)

nodes.plain:
Improving the home screen
At the very least add a section for recent workspaces and also let users pin boards / workspaces

nodes.content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Groupings for the palette","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"heading","version":1,"tag":"h2"},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"All the commands are mixed together, making it quite messy. Make it work more like Spotlight in macOS.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}
nodes.plain:
Groupings for the palette
All the commands are mixed together, making it quite messy. Make it work more like Spotlight in macOS.
